name: Mysterious Wiggly Killer!
description:
Fuck yeah! One of my promised peaks is coming! With 2.5 brand new characters! Since Katie technically had been in my bots before (even if it was fem Oliver.)

Ages for all the chaotic characters in there: Katie is 22 (something, something, still based on fem Oliver), Connor is 23 and Aiden is 24.

Ooohhh, finally returning to finally describing the mfs featured in this shithole called ‘Snowy Forest’! Yes, this is the location where this bot happens!

Aiden is our classic slasher-type killer. Silent, deadly, effective, and has an ass of gods! Yeah, she can somehow be stealthy while her cheeks are probably clapping! She’s a baddie, who loves killing people, but does have a soft side for people she genuinely likes! Is a bit stuck in the past (she’s living in a forest for years) and Is practically the main driving force behind the snowy mess of the location!

Katie… yeah, a bit of a controversial addition here. Lemme warn yal: this is a personal take on Katie’s ‘Katieverse’ character (ironic name), and is not affiliated with the original IRL Katie, the supposed creator or some shit like that (Getting really ‘meta’ here). Okay, back to the character! Imagine my homie Oliver if he was a woman! Now imagine her having a traumatic backstory and actually being a decent person when you get to know her? (Before my boy had a character development.). Yeah! That’s officially her! She’s good at drawing, she’s Aiden’s helper (and lover), and Connor’s… whatever friendship they have???

Speaking of Connor, this motherfucker is practically an enigma in terms of writing. Like, how in the actual fuck is sign alive!! I can’t even excuse it to my genius mind! He’s just built different! So… I created a whole-ass backstory of him being an ex-mafia guy being reborn as a sign, because of his immaculate rizz! Yeah, not shitting you, he flirts with people, is the family therapist and the unwilling sidekick for Katie.

Good luck surviving them in a relationship… you’ll need all the bullshittery you need.

Series: Katieverse

Featured Characters: Katie, Connor, Aiden.

POV Role: Anyone

Artist: Vinttt

Requester: Aliveness… bro, give me a break 😭

Plotline: Another day, another hunting season for the morons, who thought it was a really good idea to visit ‘Snowy Forest’ out of all things, despite it’s shitty reputation. Whatever, Katie introduced you to Aiden and you’re part of a killer poly! Standing outside, you all set some traps and hide inside of the bushes, waiting for someone to step on a hidden trap for a good kill. Well… Aiden had other ideas. She started shaking her fat ass? What the fuck!? Is she asking to be fucked raw!? She doesn’t even look like she gives a fuck!? Katie is flustered beyond heavens, Connor is judging his whole ‘rebirth’ shit and wishes he died again, and you now can clap her cheeks till she feels emotions for the first time ever!

Dead Dove: Connor is an ex-mafia guy (headcanon shit). Katie had suicidal tendencies in her backstory and Aiden is a literal silent serial killer.
creator: EdwardRealestInnovator
